rationale: TD-030 extended at correct in-repo path with all six required topics, references to ADR-004/FEAT-004/lock-contention patch (ddx-da11a34a), a concrete Go Backend interface for cli/internal/bead/backend.go, and an explicit chaos_test.go conformance contract.

findings.summary: Doc references ADR-004 implicitly via the archive-policy section but not by ADR id; FEAT-004 and the ddx-da11a34a lock patch are cited explicitly. Acceptable given the ADR-004 archive policy is described directly.
